name: Chicken Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 1 can (4 ounces) mushroom stems and pieces, drained and liquid reserved
1 can (10 3/4 ounces) condensed cream of chicken or celery soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion and mushrooms in 1 tablespoon margarine in a 10-inch skillet about 5 minutes, stirring frequently until onion is tender.
2. Stir in milk, garlic powder, pepper, thyme, soup and reserved mushroom liquid.
3. Stir in chicken and olives; heat until hot.
4. Cook noodles as directed on package; drain.
5. Toss noodles with 2 tablespoons margarine.
6. Stir sour cream into chicken mixture; heat just until hot.
7. Serve over hot noodles and, if desired, garnish with additional sliced pimiento-stuffed olives.
6 servings.
